requirement_topic.en: Cybersecurity — EKIP / CIRT-ME / NIS Framework (No Mandatory Product Certification Currently)
requirement_topic.zh: 网络安全——EKIP / CIRT-ME / NIS框架（暂无强制产品认证）
requirement_topic.zht: 網路安全——EKIP / CIRT-ME / NIS框架（暫無強制產品認證）

summary.en: Montenegro does not yet have a mandatory cybersecurity product certification scheme for consumer IoT and wireless devices equivalent to the EU RED Article 3.3(d)-(f) / EN 18031 mandatory requirements (effective 1 August 2025 in the EU). Montenegro has a NIS-aligned cybersecurity framework, with EKIP as the sector regulator for electronic communications and the national CIRT (Computer Incident Response Team) function operated under EKIP and the government. Montenegro's Agency for National Security also plays a role in national cybersecurity coordination. As the most advanced EU accession candidate in the Western Balkans (candidate since 2012), Montenegro is actively aligning with EU NIS2 and the Cyber Resilience Act (CRA) as part of its EU accession process, meaning mandatory cybersecurity product requirements may be adopted in the medium term. Exporters should monitor EKIP and government cybersecurity announcements closely.
summary.zh: 黑山尚未建立针对消费类物联网和无线设备的强制网络安全认证体系，与欧盟RED第3.3(d)-(f)条/EN 18031强制要求（欧盟2025年8月1日起生效）尚不对等。黑山建立了NIS对齐的网络安全框架，EKIP作为电子通信行业监管机构，国家CIRT（计算机应急响应小组）功能由EKIP及政府运营。黑山国家安全局在国家网络安全协调中也发挥作用。作为西巴尔干地区最先进的欧盟入盟候选国（2012年起），黑山正积极与欧盟NIS2和《网络弹性法》（CRA）对齐，作为入盟进程的一部分，这意味着中期内可能采纳强制网络安全产品要求。出口商应密切关注EKIP及政府的网络安全公告。
summary.zht: 蒙特內哥羅尚未建立針對消費類物聯網和無線設備的強制網路安全認證體系，與歐盟RED第3.3(d)-(f)條/EN 18031強制要求（歐盟2025年8月1日起生效）尚不對等。蒙特內哥羅建立了NIS對齊的網路安全框架，EKIP作為電子通訊行業監管機構，國家CIRT（計算機應急響應小組）功能由EKIP及政府運營。蒙特內哥羅國家安全局在國家網路安全協調中也發揮作用。作為西巴爾幹地區最先進的歐盟入盟候選國（2012年起），蒙特內哥羅正積極與歐盟NIS2和《網路彈性法》（CRA）對齊，作為入盟進程的一部分，這意味著中期內可能採納強制網路安全產品要求。出口商應密切關注EKIP及政府的網路安全公告。

standards_or_laws: Law on Information Security (Montenegro) — national NIS-aligned cybersecurity framework
EKIP — sector cybersecurity regulator for electronic communications in Montenegro
CIRT-ME — Montenegro national Computer Incident Response Team (under EKIP / government)
Agency for National Security (Montenegro) — national cybersecurity coordination
ETSI EN 303 645 (consumer IoT cybersecurity — advisory benchmark, not yet mandated in Montenegro)
EU NIS2 Directive / Cyber Resilience Act (CRA) — Montenegro aligning as part of EU accession process

summary.en: China has mandatory cybersecurity requirements for network-connected products under MIIT and the Cybersecurity Law, including MLPS (Multi-Level Protection Scheme) obligations for systems, and emerging mandatory cybersecurity product certification for certain IoT categories under CNCA. GB/T 36951 (IoT security) and MIIT smart device security requirements are applicable benchmarks.
summary.zh: 中国对联网产品设有MIIT及《网络安全法》下的强制网络安全要求，包括系统层面的等级保护（MLPS）义务，以及CNCA针对特定物联网类别推出的新兴强制网络安全产品认证。GB/T 36951（物联网安全）和MIIT智能设备安全要求是适用基准。
summary.zht: 中國對聯網產品設有MIIT及《網路安全法》下的強制網路安全要求，包括系統層面的等級保護（MLPS）義務，以及CNCA針對特定物聯網類別推出的新興強制網路安全產品認證。GB/T 36951（物聯網安全）和MIIT智能設備安全要求是適用基準。

standards_or_laws: Cybersecurity Law of the People's Republic of China (2017)
MLPS — Multi-Level Protection Scheme (等级保护) — systems-level obligation
GB/T 36951-2018 — IoT security reference model and general requirements
MIIT Measures on the Administration of Smart Connected Vehicle Cybersecurity (product-level, sector-specific)
CNCA emerging mandatory cybersecurity certification for select IoT product categories

gap.en: Montenegro currently has no mandatory IoT device cybersecurity product certification equivalent to China's emerging CNCA mandatory scheme or the EU mandatory RED Art. 3.3(d)-(f) requirements. However, Montenegro's EU accession trajectory and active alignment with NIS2/CRA means mandatory cybersecurity product requirements may be adopted in the medium term. Chinese GB/T 36951 or MIIT cybersecurity certifications are not recognised in Montenegro, nor currently required. Exporters should conduct voluntary compliance against ETSI EN 303 645 or CIRT-ME/EKIP advisories as a best-practice risk mitigation ahead of potential future mandatory requirements. Unlike Serbia (CERT-RS), Montenegro's national incident response function is CIRT-ME under EKIP.
gap.zh: 黑山目前没有与中国新兴CNCA强制方案或欧盟RED第3.3(d)-(f)条强制要求等效的物联网设备网络安全产品强制认证。但黑山的欧盟入盟进程及其与NIS2/CRA的积极对齐意味着中期内可能采纳强制网络安全产品要求。中国GB/T 36951或MIIT网络安全认证在黑山不被认可，目前也无相关要求。出口商应参照ETSI EN 303 645或CIRT-ME/EKIP建议进行自愿合规，作为应对潜在未来强制要求的最佳实践风险缓解措施。与塞尔维亚（CERT-RS）不同，黑山的国家事件响应职能为EKIP下设的CIRT-ME。
gap.zht: 蒙特內哥羅目前沒有與中國新興CNCA強制方案或歐盟RED第3.3(d)-(f)條強制要求等效的物聯網設備網路安全產品強制認證。但蒙特內哥羅的歐盟入盟進程及其與NIS2/CRA的積極對齊意味著中期內可能採納強制網路安全產品要求。中國GB/T 36951或MIIT網路安全認證在蒙特內哥羅不被認可，目前也無相關要求。出口商應參照ETSI EN 303 645或CIRT-ME/EKIP建議進行自願合規，作為應對潛在未來強制要求的最佳實踐風險緩解措施。與塞爾維亞（CERT-RS）不同，蒙特內哥羅的國家事件響應職能為EKIP下設的CIRT-ME。

source.publisher: EKIP — Agencija za elektronske komunikacije i poštansku djelatnost (Electronic Communications and Postal Agency, Montenegro)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Montenegro does not currently mandate cybersecurity product certification for general consumer wireless / IoT devices. EKIP and CIRT-ME issue advisories; the Agency for National Security oversees national cybersecurity coordination. Voluntary alignment with ETSI EN 303 645 or EKIP/CIRT-ME guidelines is recommended as a risk mitigation measure, given Montenegro's EU accession candidacy and the likelihood of future mandatory requirements mirroring EU RED Art. 3.3(d)-(f) and the Cyber Resilience Act. Chinese GB/T 36951 or MIIT cybersecurity documentation is not required or recognised. Monitor EKIP and Montenegrin government announcements for regulatory changes.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 黑山目前未对普通消费类无线/物联网设备强制要求网络安全产品认证。EKIP和CIRT-ME发布建议，国家安全局负责监督国家网络安全协调。考虑到黑山的入盟候选国地位及未来可能镜像欧盟RED第3.3(d)-(f)条及《网络弹性法》强制要求的可能性，建议自愿参照ETSI EN 303 645或EKIP/CIRT-ME指南作为风险缓解措施。中国GB/T 36951或MIIT网络安全文件在黑山不作要求，也不被认可。请持续关注EKIP及黑山政府的法规动态公告。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 蒙特內哥羅目前未對普通消費類無線/物聯網設備強制要求網路安全產品認證。EKIP和CIRT-ME發布建議，國家安全局負責監督國家網路安全協調。考慮到蒙特內哥羅的入盟候選國地位及未來可能鏡像歐盟RED第3.3(d)-(f)條及《網路彈性法》強制要求的可能性，建議自願參照ETSI EN 303 645或EKIP/CIRT-ME指南作為風險緩解措施。中國GB/T 36951或MIIT網路安全文件在蒙特內哥羅不作要求，也不被認可。請持續關注EKIP及蒙特內哥羅政府的法規動態公告。
